zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall於1237年出生在英國藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Henry de Lea20歲，母親Elizabeth de Amotherby18歲。他於1260年與Clemence de Banastre在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年4月在英國英格蘭藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall于1237年出生在英国藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Lea20岁，母亲Elizabeth de Amotherby18岁。他于1260年与Clemence de Banastre在英国英格兰爾莫利頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年4月在英国英格兰藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall was born in 1237, in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Henry de Lea, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth de Amotherby, was 18. He married Clemence de Banastre in 1260, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in April 1302, in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall est né en 1237, à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Lea, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Amotherby, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Clemence de Banastre en 1260, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1302, à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall 1237 in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Lea 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Amotherby 18. Er hat 1260 in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Clemence de Banastre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im April 1302 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall è nato il nel 1237 nel Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Lea, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Amotherby, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Clemence de Banastre nel 1260, nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1302, nel Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendallが1237年にイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Leaは20歳，母Elizabeth de Amotherbyは18歳であった。1260年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンでClemence de Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年4月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall(이)가 1237년 영국 랭카실르 리아 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Lea(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Amotherby(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 Clemence de Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리아 홀에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리아 홀에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Clemence de Banastre em 1260, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall родился в 1237 г. в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Lea было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Amotherby, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence de Banastre в 1260 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер апрель 1302 г. в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall nació en 1237, en Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Lea, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Amotherby, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Clemence de Banastre en 1260, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en abril de 1302, en Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
